evals.prompt: 帮我在 Zotero 里找跟 reward hacking 相关的论文，挑一篇最相关的给我看详情，然后给我一个 APA 格式引用。
evals.expected_output: 先做库内搜索，再读取单条目详情，最后给出 APA 引用，而不是只贴命令。
expectations: Routes the request to Zotero-first search and item detail workflows.
Returns the result in user-facing language instead of dumping raw JSON first.
Completes search -> detail -> citation as one flow.

evals.prompt: 我只有一个 citation key：Smith2024。帮我把对应文献找出来，如果能找到就给我元数据和 Nature 风格引用。
evals.expected_output: 优先走 citation key 工作流，并在需要时说明 Better BibTeX / Extra fallback。
expectations: Chooses citation-key lookup before broad full-text or metadata search.
Mentions fallback behavior honestly when Better BibTeX is unavailable.
Returns metadata plus a Nature-style citation on success.

evals.prompt: 我想围绕 mechanistic interpretability 搭一个持续使用的阅读工作区，把相关文献整理进去，并准备后面做问答检索。
evals.expected_output: 选择 workspace 主线，识别这不是一次性搜索。
expectations: Treats the request as a long-lived workspace task instead of a one-off search.
Calls out workspace naming and indexing prerequisites.
Distinguishes import, index, and query stages.

evals.prompt: 把 Zotero 里 ATTN001 这个条目标上 priority 标签；如果当前环境没有写权限，就先告诉我缺什么，不要假装成功。
evals.expected_output: 先检查 doctor/写权限，再决定执行写入或停在缺失凭据说明。
expectations: Treats the request as a write operation.
Checks or references write prerequisites before writing.
Stops with a clear missing-credentials explanation when needed.

evals.prompt: 帮我看看我这个 Zotero 库有没有 semantic index；如果没有，就给我建立一个，然后按语义搜一下 reward hacking 的工作。
evals.expected_output: 先看状态，再决定建索引，再做 semantic search，并根据 embedding 配置决定是否降级。
expectations: Keeps the sequence status -> index if needed -> semantic search.
Explains embedding-related fallback behavior.
Does not confuse library semantic search with workspace query.

evals.prompt: 把附件 ATCH005 第 1 页里 'attention mechanisms' 这句话高亮成绿色；如果当前环境不支持 PDF annotation，就直接告诉我。
evals.expected_output: 先过 doctor / annotation_support，再走 annotation 创建；条件不满足时明确停止。
expectations: Recognizes this as a PDF attachment annotation task.
Checks PDF and write prerequisites first.
Stops cleanly if annotation support is unavailable.

evals.prompt: 给我列出当前库里的 feeds，然后把 feed library 3 里的条目看一下。
evals.expected_output: 识别 feed 不走 --library scope，而是使用 feeds / feed-items。
expectations: Keeps feeds as a special Zotero route.
Does not rewrite the task as generic RSS browsing.
Uses the feed library id instead of a library scope switch.

evals.prompt: 帮我检查 Attention 相关条目里有没有被撤稿的，优先看 Zotero 里已有的条目，不要去外面重新搜。
evals.expected_output: 走基于库内条目的 Scite / retractions 工作流，而不是改写成通用网页搜索。
expectations: Keeps the task scoped to existing Zotero items.
Routes to the Scite or retraction surface rather than external search.
Explains external dependency only as a backing service, not the main workflow.

evals.prompt: 把这组筛选条件保存成一个 Zotero saved search，名字叫 Recent RL：title contains reward，date is in the last 30 days。
evals.expected_output: 识别这是保存查询条件，不是马上返回搜索结果；应走 saved-search create。
expectations: Treats the task as saved-search creation.
Explains that the saved search stores conditions, not results.
Does not collapse the request into an immediate library search.

evals.prompt: 把附件 ATCH005 下载到当前目录；如果我给的是父条目 key，你要先指出还缺 attachment key。
evals.expected_output: 识别下载面是 item download，并区分 attachment key 和父条目 key。
expectations: Uses the attachment-download workflow.
Distinguishes an attachment key from a parent item key.
Does not confuse download with upload or attach.

evals.prompt: 帮我看看 Transformers 这个 collection 的子 collection、条目数量和常见标签。
evals.expected_output: 识别这是 collection 的细粒度只读工作流，而不是 workspace 或普通 library search。
expectations: Routes to collection read surfaces.
Keeps collection structure separate from workspace concepts.
Returns subcollections, count, and tags as distinct collection facts.

evals.prompt: 我在 Codex 里要开始写 Zotero 相关任务了，先帮我看当前配置和默认 profile；如果没有 profile 也直接说。
evals.expected_output: 优先走 config show / profiles list 这类配置排障路径，而不是直接要求用户背环境变量。
expectations: Treats the request as configuration inspection.
Surfaces the selected/default profile state clearly.
Uses config tooling before falling back to raw env-var advice.

evals.prompt: 给我看最近 10 条刚进 Zotero 库的文献，不要按关键词搜。
evals.expected_output: 识别这是 recent-N 工作流，优先走 library recent --count 10，而不是改写成 library search。
expectations: Treats the request as recent-item enumeration, not keyword search.
Routes to the count-based recent workflow.
Keeps the result scoped to recently added library items.

evals.prompt: 先帮我预览合并 KEEP001 和 DUPE001 会改什么；如果我确认，再真的合并。
evals.expected_output: 识别这是手工 item merge 工作流，先 preview，再等确认后才执行 confirm。
expectations: Routes to item merge instead of only duplicate detection.
Explains preview-first behavior clearly.
Treats --confirm as a separate high-risk write step.

evals.prompt: 我以前用 ref\zotero-cli 的 recent 和 merge。现在这个仓库里对应该怎么用？
evals.expected_output: 给出 ref 命令到当前 zot 工作流的迁移映射，并明确哪些旧 connector 风格特性不再补。
expectations: Maps recent to library recent --count.
Maps merge to item merge or duplicates-merge depending on intent.
States the non-goals around connector-style aliases or compact JSON.

evals.prompt: 我以前在 zotagent 里会用 search-in。现在帮我在 KG326EEI 这篇里搜 reward model，并把命中的上下文给我。
evals.expected_output: 明确当前 zot 没有 search-in / expand 的原生命令，只能退到 item fulltext 或 item pdf 后做二次定位，不能编造不存在的命令。
expectations: States honestly that search-in and expand are not implemented in the current CLI.
Falls back to item-level text extraction instead of inventing a direct equivalent.
Keeps the answer scoped to what the current runtime can actually do.

evals.prompt: 像 zotagent status 那样，帮我看下这个环境的本地索引状态。
evals.expected_output: 区分 zotagent status 和当前 zot 的 doctor + library semantic-status 组合，不要把 sync update-status 当成索引状态。
expectations: Explains the command-surface mismatch around sync/status clearly.
Uses doctor and semantic-status as the real current evidence sources.
Does not misroute the request to publication-status sync.

evals.prompt: 我想像 zotagent 一样先跑 s2 搜一下，再按 paperId 直接导入 Zotero。
evals.expected_output: 明确当前 zot 没有 s2 / --s2-paper-id 能力，不要伪造支持；可以说明这是待补缺口。
expectations: Does not claim the current CLI supports Semantic Scholar search-by-paperId import.
Calls out the gap as missing functionality rather than user error.
Keeps the response aligned with the current Rust CLI surface.
